description:
Create a new reference in the Jurism library for a Continuing Legal Education (CLE) presentation. The reference should be of item type 'Presentation' and contain the following details:

- Title: The Future of Legal Tech: AI and Ethics
- Presenters: Jordan Smith and Taylor Doe
- Genre: Panel Discussion
- Meeting Name: Legal Tech Summit 2025
- Place: New York, NY
- Date: 2025-03-10
- URL: https://www.legaltechsummit.com/2025/ethics
